results.owner_or_reason: lib/E2-S1 (pkg/events CloudEvents envelope+orvexcell stamp), api/E1-S4 (CloudEvent publish via transactional outbox), knowledge/E10-S1 (Studio corpora ingestion studio.skill/memory/chat.*), contracts/E3-S1 (CloudEvent type catalog events/catalog.yaml). ADR-0010 is a naming/taxonomy convention (studio.<subdomain>.<event>), explicitly defers concrete per-type schemas to FR-C9 as-built contracts; envelope conformance covered separately via ADR-0007/A-EVENTS.
